themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "וְהִשְׁבַּתֶּ֥ם: and ye make them rest - to repose, i.e., desist from exertion; used in many...".

themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved.

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "How do impossible expectations create false guilt in modern systems?". Word-study detail reinforces "רֵיחֵ֗נוּ: because ye have made our savour - odor (as if blown)".

themes.label: Kingdom
